source: spidersan/docs/arch/STATE.json — CLI-side mirror of spidersan-ai/docs/arch/STATE.json items that touch this repo
scope: Items whose contracts and code live in spidersan/. Items that live in spidersan-ai/ (P0-B, P0-H2, P1-C4, P2-permissive-checker, P2-adversarial) are tracked in spidersan-ai/docs/arch/STATE.json — see source link there.

candidates.title: DEEPENING #2: extract conflict-tier module
candidates.rationale: TIER 1/2/3 path-pattern lists duplicated byte-for-byte across 5 files (originally specced as 4; codex caught lib/ai/event-handler.ts:14-28 during impl).
candidates.cross_cut: Same work as SECURITY-H10 (spidersan-ai/docs/SECURITY_HARDENING.md). yosef sequencing: H10 lands AFTER #2 — now unblocked.
candidates.completed_at: 2026-05-04T00:55Z by spidersan-m5 — codex gpt-5.4/high implementation; +159/-130 LOC (net +29); 7/7 tests pass; tsc + pnpm build clean. DEEPENING-3 now unblocked (was depends_on this).

candidates.title: DEEPENING #1: split StorageAdapter into BranchRegistryStore + SupabaseRegistrySyncClient
candidates.rolled_in: CORE.md SQLite→JSON correction; MemoryRegistryStore test double (sherlocksan-m2 A2 #5 ack).
candidates.rationale: StorageAdapter conflates per-machine persistence with cross-machine sync; tests need to mock Supabase to exercise registry behavior; the SQLite/JSON storage choice is hidden inside one of two implementations.
candidates.next_action: Author the two focused interfaces + JSON impl + Memory test double; keep StorageAdapter as a deprecated composing shim.

candidates.title: DEEPENING #3: pure ConflictAnalyzer
candidates.rationale: AST already deep at lib/ast.ts:15; what's still inlined is overlap+tier at conflicts.ts:64,446. Was blocked on #2; UNBLOCKED 2026-05-04 by DEEPENING-2 merge.
candidates.cross_cut: Final landing pad for SECURITY-H10 (symbol-aware classifier). The classifierSource enum + useSymbolAware flag are H10's affordances.
candidates.next_action: Ready to author. Compose classifyTier (now in src/lib/conflict-tier.ts) with src/lib/ast.ts.

operational_gates.rule: tsc --noEmit AND pnpm build must remain clean across every PR landing one of these contracts.
User-visible CLI output for `spidersan conflicts` must be byte-identical to pre-DEEPENING for existing fixtures, until SECURITY-H10 explicitly opts in to symbol-aware mode.
